title: e2e: more ExitCleanly() on more test files
body:
Trying a different approach. Instead of one-file-at-a-time, do a bunch of test files, but in two commits: one a simple string substitution of `Expect...Exit(0)` to `...ExitCleanly()`, and the second being manual fixes. The second commit is the important one to review.
```release-note
None
```
